faintSemanticRule: authored reversible-faint cues use open spiral, unfocused, or pose-appropriate closed eyes in a prone KO context; no literal X/cross or death symbol. The battle status renderer must layer the stun halo at runtime instead of baking it into pet frames

temporalStaticReview.down: both views preserve the authored reversible-faint descent and hold; spiral, unfocused, or prone closed-eye cues remain in the pet art
temporalStaticReview.revive: both views begin from exact down-8 RGBA and recover without a pose pop
temporalStaticReview.runtimeStatusOverlay: stun halo is a separate runtime battle-status layer and is intentionally absent from these frames
temporalStaticReview.dodge: front and back views use explicit evade arcs and return to the authored anchor
temporalStaticReview.backSkill: coil/charge, airborne forward release, and anchor recovery are readable
temporalStaticReview.backKnockaway: impact produces a 26px airborne lift with authored tumble/roll poses
